title: pisonia calophylla var. rufescens
intro: Pisonia calophylla var. rufescens, also known as the Beach Morning Glory, is a flowering plant native to tropical regions of the Pacific Islands. The leaves and roots of the Beach Morning Glory are used in traditional medicine, exhibiting antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is valued for its potential to aid in the treatment of various health conditions, including fever, skin infections, and respiratory issues, thanks to its expectorant and antispasmodic properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and ointments, which can be applied topically to soothe skin irritations and promote overall well-being.
